name: AddGameobjectCommand
description: send out a request to add a gameObject to the scene

name: DeleteGameobjectCommand
description: send out a request to delete a gameObject in the scene

name: AttachComponentCommand
description: adds a component to a specific gameobject

name: DetachComponentCommand
description: removes a component attached to a particular gameobject, if it exists

name: UpdateComponentCommand
description: Updates a component attached to a particular gameobject, if it exists
